task_description: Phase 2 Foundation: Component Contracts + Slot System (2.2/I11) + Test Harness (I27) — (1) Add Django {% block %} slots to all 5 existing component templates so theme authors can override specific parts via {% extends %}. (2) Define component contracts (required context vars, HTML elements, accessibility attrs). (3) Create ComponentTestCase base class for rendering and asserting on component output HTML.

checklist.action: read ALL 5 existing component templates (button, card, alert, badge, input)
read theme_components.py — how tags render components
read template_resolver.py — theme-aware resolution from Phase 1.1
design slot system: which {% block %} slots each component gets
design component contracts: context vars, required elements, a11y attrs per component
design ComponentTestCase: base class with render_component(), assert_element(), assert_attr()
design contracts as data (dict) so validate command and tests share same source of truth
add {% block %} slots to all 5 component templates
create djust_theming/contracts.py with component contract definitions
create docs/component-contracts.md with contract reference for all components
update customization.md with slot override examples

11.name: Code Review
11.subagent_prompt: Review PR #{pr_number} in {project_path} targeting {pr_target_branch}. Read .pipeline-state/*-plan.md. git diff, tests. Post review gh pr review {pr_number} --comment. Output APPROVE/REQUEST_CHANGES.

13.name: Merge PR
13.subagent_prompt: gh pr merge {pr_number} --squash --delete-branch in {project_path}. Output PR_MERGED or MERGE_FAILED.

14.name: Retrospective
14.subagent_prompt: Retro for {task_description}. PR #{pr_number} in {project_path}. Rate 1-5. gh pr comment {pr_number}. Append .pipeline-log.md. Output RETRO_COMPLETE.
